Container.Name: HELBOOT
Container.Overview: HELBOOT is a provisioning engine for homelabs: upload original OS ISOs, build installation profiles, register machines by MAC address and get fully automated network installations (PXE / iPXE / HTTP boot) for Windows, Debian, Ubuntu, Fedora, openSUSE, Proxmox VE and more. Works alongside your existing router DHCP (ProxyDHCP mode) or as a standalone DHCP server. Host network mode is strongly recommended: PXE relies on DHCP broadcasts that do not traverse Docker bridge networking. Ensure UDP 67/69/4011 and TCP 8080 are free on the host.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: HELBOOT state: database, generated boot assets, logs, secrets.

Config.Name: ISO Library
Config.Description: Optional: existing share with original OS ISO files. HELBOOT never modifies them.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP listen address for the web UI, API and HTTP boot (host network). Format :PORT.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn or error.
